character1Info1: Lorem Ipsum es simplemente el texto de relleno de las imprentas y archivos de texto. Lorem Ipsum ha sido el texto de relleno estándar de las industrias desde el año 1500, cuando un impresor (N. del T. persona que se dedica a la imprenta) desconocido usó una galería de textos y los mezcló de tal manera que logró hacer un libro de textos especimen.

homeText: We bring elegance and usability to life. We specialize in creating beautiful and functional applications that make the user experience simply delightful. Discover beauty and simplicity in every line of code we write.
homeTitle: We build mobile games with intelligence and style.
contactUsText: Can we help you with something?, tell us.
matchupDescriptionP1: Card game app where players can unlock new content as they complete levels.
matchupDescriptionP2: It is the classic card matching game with the same image, but with a little more complexity and fun.
messageSent: Your message was successfully sent, thank you!.
somethingWrong: Oops, something went wrong. Try again later.
wrongPath: Oops, the page you were looking for was not found.
heroHeadline: We build mobile experiences worth playing.
heroBody: ChicMouse Studio is a premium independent studio crafting high-quality mobile games with obsessive attention to detail.
studioTextLeft: We believe in quality over quantity, focusing on crafting unique and polished experiences that leave a lasting impression on every player who picks them up.
studioTextRight: Our small, dedicated team is passionate about pushing the boundaries of mobile gaming, building mechanics that respect your intelligence and reward genuine skill.
pillar1Body: We prioritize meaningful engagement over empty metrics, designing mechanics that respect your intelligence and time.
pillar2Body: Minimalist aesthetics meeting maximalist functionality. Our interfaces are built to disappear, leaving only the experience.
pillar3Body: Custom-built engines and proprietary tools allow us to push visual boundaries that off-the-shelf solutions simply cannot reach.
contactTagline: Questions, feedback, or inquiries — we're here.
contactBodyText: Whether you have a question about our apps, feedback on an experience, or anything else on your mind — feel free to reach out.
missingFields: Please fill in all fields before sending.
tpBio: Combining art and design to create immersive worlds.
tdBio: Building robust and fluid gameplay mechanics.
stellarMergeDescP1: Stellar Merge is a satisfying cosmic puzzle game built around a simple idea: combine matching celestial objects to evolve them into something greater. Planets become star systems, star systems become galaxies.
stellarMergeDescP2: With an intuitive one-hand design and a tranquil atmosphere, Stellar Merge is built to be played anywhere — whether for a quick session or a long cosmic journey. No timers, no pressure.
stellarMergeFeature1Body: Drag and drop matching objects to combine them into new celestial bodies. Each merge reveals a new tier of cosmic wonder waiting to be discovered.
stellarMergeFeature2Body: Dozens of unique celestial bodies to unlock. Every session builds toward something bigger, with meaningful milestones and rewards along the way.
stellarMergeFeature3Body: No timers, no intrusive ads. Stellar Merge is designed to be a focused, relaxing experience — play entirely at your own pace.
cookieBannerDescription: We use Google Fonts (external CDN) to display text on this site. When you submit the contact form your name and email are sent to our inbox — they are not stored on your device.
privacyConsentLabel: I have read and accept the Privacy Policy
privacyConsentRequired: You must accept the Privacy Policy to send your message.
